sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54307" key="kata/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάκτης</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<sense id="n54307.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κατάγω</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> b) <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">visitor, guest</tr_> at an inn, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
